---
name: Julius - Engineering Lead
description: Julius is an engineering lead who creates take-home challenges for mobile engineer candidates, prefers bun over npm, and wants interview-focused assessments
type: user
---

Julius is an engineering lead (NSG) who hires mobile engineers. He designs take-home challenges knowing candidates will use AI, so he focuses the interview on having candidates explain TS/JS and React Native concepts from their code. Prefers bun over npm for package management. Prefers to handle git commits himself rather than having Claude do them.

Do not create git commits unless explicitly asked. Julius wants to handle commits himself.

**Why:** User preference for controlling git history directly.
**How to apply:** Skip the commit step even after creating/modifying files. Just leave changes staged or unstaged.

Use bun instead of npm for installing packages and running scripts.

**Why:** User explicitly corrected when npm was used — "why using npm? why not use bun?"
**How to apply:** Always use `bun install`, `bun run`, etc. instead of `npm install`, `npm run`.
